attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ID       ,                     
SERVICE_WEB_ORDER_ID   ,       
TD_SYSFNLIB.OREPLACE(TD_SYSFNLIB.OREPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(SERVICE_QUOTE_NUMBER,'[^!-~a-zA-Z0-9]+',' ',1,0,'i') , X'0d' , ' ') , X'0a' , ' ') AS SERVICE_QUOTE_NUMBER ,         
CISCO_CREATED_FLAG  ,          
EVENT_TYPE         ,           
CAST(CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATETIME ,   
CUSTOMER_REQ_SHIP_DATE ,       
CHANGE_IDENTIFIER  ,           
EXPIRATION_DATE   ,            
EXTENDED_EXPIRATION_DATE  ,    
TRANSACTION_ID       ,         
DISTI_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER  ,    
TRANSLATE(DISTI_RESELLER_SO_LINE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DISTI_RESELLER_SO_LINE_NUMBER,
PROMO_NUMBER      ,            
CONVERSION_RATE  ,             
SOURCE_PROFILE_ID  ,           
WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID,           
WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID ,          
WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID ,         
WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID ,          
CURRENCY_CODE,                 
DEAL_ID ,                                           
DROP_SHIP ,                    
COST_UNIT_PRICE ,             
OFFICIAL         ,             
0 AS ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE ,      
REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE ,          
REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC  ,      
QUANTITY  ,                    
POSTED_DATE ,                  
ACTIVE_FLAG , 
DISTI_BOOK_DATE,                     
TRANSLATE(RESELLER_DISTI_PO_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) RESELLER_DISTI_PO_NUMBER,      
VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE ,     
VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC ,  
VALUATION_PRICE     ,          
VALUATION_PRICE_LC ,           
MFG_PART_NUMBER ,
DISTI_RESELLER_SO_DATE  ,
ORIG_TRANSACTION_ID,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE ,  
SERVICE_TYPE,
SERVICE_BOOKING_TYPE,
SERVICE_BOOKING_DURATION,
CISCO_BOOKED   ,
DSV_UNIQUE_ID    ,
D2D_FLAG,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
REFRESH_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME,
STATUS,
TRANSLATE(REPORTED_DEAL_ID  USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
ORIGINAL_BOOKING_REF_ID,
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
MAGIC_KEY ,
START_DATE ,
END_DATE ,
DURATION,
NET_PRICE_FLAG ,
REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE,/*Added as part of SFP Rel - OCT*/
GPL_PRICE,   /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
GPL_PRICE_LC, /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
CHANGE_REASON_DESC, /*added as part of MBR DSV cancellation reason changes*/
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
COALESCE(Strategic_Intent,'UNKNOWN'),
COALESCE(Strategic_Class,'UNKNOWN'),
SERVICE_PERIOD,
CASE 
    WHEN Strategic_Intent = 'AI_Capable_Intent_Yes' AND STRATEGIC_FACTOR > 0 AND STRATEGIC_FACTOR<=1 THEN STRATEGIC_FACTOR
    ELSE 1 
END AS AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* Added as part of MVP4 MAY Rel */
FROM  $$NRTACCUMVWDB.GG_WIPS_DSV_BOOKINGS_EDW_INTF
  WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))
  AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE' 
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TRANSACTION_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
